characters.name: Officers and Sergeants of the St. Hadrian Civic Guard

event: Group Portrait of the St. Hadrian Civic Guard
description: A wide group portrait of approximately twenty-five men in 17th-century Dutch military dress, arranged in two loose rows. The officers wear colorful sashes in orange, blue, and white over their clothing, and carry halberds, muskets, and pikes. Their dress ranges from elegant doublets with lace collars to more utilitarian military garb. The men look outward with confident expressions. A cityscape with buildings is faintly visible in the background at the right. The composition is lively, with figures in varied poses avoiding rigid symmetry.

_meta.title: Officers And Sergeants Of The St. Hadrian Civic Guard
